name: Cherry-Coconut Bars
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Mix cookie mix and margarine; press in ungreased baking pan, 13x9x2". Bake for 25 minutes. Mix remaining ingredients except nuts; spread over baked layer. Sprinkle with nuts. Bake for another 25 minutes. Cool completely. Cut into bars, about 2x1".
